what_i_changed: docs/vision_rules_fog_of_war.md: Added visibility radii and rules for auto-spawned buildings (house, farm, food_stand) and Guards for Fog of War integration. Agent 03 implements engine hooks in Round 2.
how_to_test: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick (no game code change; doc only)

sprint_meta.notes: WK17: Quality, Logic, & Immersion. Agent 08: Peasant selection + info panel.

what_i_changed: game/engine.py: selected_peasant; try_select_peasant(screen_pos); clear selected_peasant in try_select_hero/tc/guard/building and on empty click; game_state['selected_peasant'].
game/input_handler.py: try_select_peasant in selection chain (after guard, before building); clear selected_peasant on hero/tc/guard/empty; close_selection clears selected_peasant.
game/ui/hud.py: _peasant_action_label(peasant), _render_peasant_summary(surface, peasant, left_rect); left panel shows peasant panel when selected_peasant set (title Peasant, Action, HP bar).
how_to_test: Run game, wait for peasants to spawn. Click a peasant: left panel shows 'Peasant' with Action (e.g. Building (Farm), Repairing (Market), Resting in castle, Walking) and HP bar.
Click hero/building/empty: peasant selection clears. Click peasant again: panel displays.
